---
title: Jinrui Du
image: profile1.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/SantiDu
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://www.instagram.com/santi_du
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/santidu
---

I am Jin, MSc student in Statistics and Data Science. 

I go to ballet class twice a week.
I work out 6 times a week.
I read and write every day.
